name: Docker Hub
description: Monitor Docker Hub organization members, teams, and container repositories for compliance

credentialFields.label: Docker Hub Username
credentialFields.helpText: Your Docker Hub username (must be an owner/admin of the organization)

credentialFields.label: Personal Access Token
credentialFields.helpText: Docker Hub Personal Access Token with Read-only access. Generate at https://hub.docker.com/settings/security

credentialFields.label: Organization Name
credentialFields.helpText: Your Docker Hub organization name (the namespace shown in hub.docker.com/orgs/<name>)

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Docker Hub organization members and their roles to ensure proper access controls

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Verifies Docker Hub organization teams are properly configured with members and descriptions

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Lists all Docker Hub repositories in the organization for infrastructure inventory tracking
